title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Max Healthcare International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Max Healthcare International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!
